thread.title: The United States and Azerbaijan can become reliable partners in the field of green energy –
thread.title_full: The United States and Azerbaijan can become reliable partners in the field of green energy –

author: archyworldyscom
title: The United States and Azerbaijan can become reliable partners in the field of green energy –
text:
United States and Azerbaijan can become reliable partners in the field of green energy”/>
The United States and Azerbaijan can become reliable partners in the development of green energy.
As reported Tuesday Day.Work with reference to Trend the American Minister of Agriculture said this in a press conference at COP29 Tom Vilsack .
“Azerbaijan is an energy producer and I think we can be reliable partners, especially with continued efforts to diversify the energy portfolio through renewable energy sources. Much of what we have learned in the United States in the field of green energy development can be a topic for discussion and exchange of experiences,” he added.
Vilsack also noted that the United States has a great opportunity to take advantage of the key role Azerbaijan plays in East-West trade.
“We can work to create the conditions for the free movement of goods in both directions. Huge opportunities and markets open up here and, in my opinion, your country can play a vital role in connecting the East and the West the key sectors where, in my opinion, opinion is of great importance,” he noted .
We remind you that the 29th session of the Conference of the Parties to the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change (COP29) began in Baku on 11 November.
The United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change is an agreement signed at the Earth Summit in Rio de Janeiro in June 1992 to prevent dangerous human interference with the climate system. The abbreviation COP (Conference of the Parties) translated from English means “Conference of the Parties”, this is the highest legislative body that controls the implementation of the Framework Convention on Climate Change.
There are 198 countries that adhere to the Convention. Unless otherwise agreed between the parties, the COP is held annually. The first COP event took place in March 1995 in Berlin and its secretariat is located in Bonn.
